since_last: 53% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.83%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.20% · BTC +0.04% · Gold -0.51% · Nasdaq100 +0.31%. 53% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.83%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.83%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.93%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.32%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.32%, VRT +9.06%, MRVL +8.97%, SMR +8.56%, AMAT +7.09%. Laggards: SNAP -4.65%, META -4.20%, APP -4.09%, ISRG -2.97%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.29% at $199.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
